# gpdata

> gpdata is an unofficial, fan-made archive of Formula 1 season and Grand Prix
> data — race results, qualifying classifications, sprint sessions, and weather —
> sourced from F1's own public live-timing feeds. Built for personal/educational,
> non-commercial use.

## About

gpdata is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Formula 1, Formula
One Management, the FIA, or any F1 team, driver, or sponsor. All F1-related
names, logos, and marks are the property of their respective owners.

## Data

Covers every Grand Prix weekend from 2018 onward (2022 is not currently
available). For each weekend: qualifying (Q1/Q2/Q3, or Sprint Qualifying for
sprint weekends), race (or Sprint) results with gaps, best lap, pit stops, and
fastest-lap markers, plus session weather (air/track temperature, humidity).
Data is pulled directly from F1's live-timing static API and normalized into a
Postgres database.

## Pages

- [/](https://gpdata.app/): season grid — one tile per race/sprint weekend for
  a selected year, with round info, winner, pole, and weather at a glance.
- /gp/[key]: per-Grand-Prix detail page — full qualifying and race
  classification, weather, and a Qualifying/Race (or Sprint
  Qualifying/Sprint) tab switch.

## Notes

Non-commercial, informational use only. No user accounts, no data submission —
gpdata is read-only, sourced entirely from F1's own live-timing service.
